The '''''Curich''-class shuttle''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] design.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Curich-class.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Port profile view of a ''Curich''-class shuttle]]
The ''Curich''-class was designed to carry light cargo or passengers for quick, short duration trips, such as across well-known [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]].

==History==
Shortly after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor General]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Dixton]] employed a ''Curich''-class shuttle fitted to serve his needs to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] himself and his entourage to [[Vakkar/Legends|Vakkar]], the capital of the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. However, during transit, his transport was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces.<ref name="Godking">{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack}}</ref>
